mapper.select: select p.*, comm.nx_community_name as community_name from nx_customer_promoter p left join nx_community comm on p.community_id = comm.nx_community_id where p.nx_customer_promoter_id = #{value}
mapper.insert: insert into nx_customer_promoter (promoter_name, promoter_phone, promoter_type, commerce_id, community_id, promoter_status, cooperation_start_at, cooperation_end_at) values (#{promoterName}, #{promoterPhone}, #{promoterType}, #{commerceId}, #{communityId}, #{promoterStatus}, #{cooperationStartAt}, #{cooperationEndAt})
mapper.select: select count(*) from nx_customer_user_referral where source_owner_type = 'EXTERNAL_PROMOTER' and source_owner_id = #{value} and qualification_status = 'QUALIFIED'
